faq.a: BI Worldwide operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BI Worldwide's India GCCs?
faq.a: BI Worldwide's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BI Worldwide's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 9 leaders at BI Worldwide's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
